Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With The Courts Discovery Ruling From January 24, 2024, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF PABLO CASTANEDA, ADRIANA LOPEZ's Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With The Courts Discovery Ruling From January 24, 2024, And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar on the same date at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU).

NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURTS DISCOVERY RULING FROM JANUARY 24, 2024, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RE: Plaintiff's MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURTS DISCOVERY RULING FROM JANUARY 24, 2024, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Deepak Devabose, Esq., of Knight Law Group LLP, (310) 552-2250, for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued/discussed. At the outset, counsel reports that the parties have come to an agreement. Counsel requests to withdraw the pending motion, on the record. Plaintiff's MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURTS DISCOVERY RULING FROM JANUARY 24, 2024, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is taken off calendar by the court at the request of the moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Of A Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant General Motors Llc, And Request For Sanctions (Motions)
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ELVIRA KAMOSKO, ESq. of Knight Law Group, LLP (Tel: 310-552-2250) for plaintiffs;
Atty. XYLON QUEZADA, Esq. of Erskine Law Group, PC (Tel: 949-777-6032) for defendant General Motors LLC.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS PABLO CASTANEDA, and ADRIANA LOPEZ's Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Of A Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant General Motors LLC, And Request For Sanctions.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The judge pro-tem's report and recommendation is adopted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and which attaches a copy of the report and recommendation.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
